query:
UPDATE user_invite_links
        SET
            use_count  = use_count + 1,
            updated_at = NOW(),
            revoked    = CASE WHEN type = 'one-time' THEN TRUE ELSE revoked END,
            revoked_at = CASE WHEN type = 'one-time' THEN NOW() ELSE revoked_at END
        WHERE id = $1
